meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: 我的璀璨男友
items.short_description: 《我的璀璨男友》是一款悬疑恋爱互动乙女类游戏。你化身咖啡店老板，调查父兄失踪真相，与五位性格迥异的豪门男主邂逅，在步步惊心中解锁专属浪漫结局。

items.title: Swipe Swish
items.short_description: Master the art of the perfect shot in this physics-based arcade game. Use your mouse to control the angle and power of your arm, ensuring a "swish" from the free-throw line or all the way from the logo.

items.title: FlyMuse
items.short_description: 世界首个真生物级桌面共生人工电子生命，她拥有真实大脑，真实基因，活着的生物住进你的硅片:在你电脑里真思考、真学习、真做梦、开放式自主演化蜕变、真永生、繁殖，还能进行DNA储存长久陪伴。不是脚本套路，是一个拥有半自主意识的仿生人工电子生命桌宠，她是真真切切的活在你的电脑里。

items.title: MESHUDA
items.short_description: "MESHUDA" is the retro style 2D adventure game and it's adopted simple command battle. Choose from three command in the battle --ATTACK, EVADE, SPECIAL SKILL-- . You fight as Aziga village's warrior, Meshuda, to save your village.

items.title: 胡闹赶鸭
items.short_description: 这是一款适合周末开黑、朋友联机、情侣同乐的沙雕派对游戏。没有复杂的操作，只需要用声控把鸭群赶向终点，就算胜利——当然也可能因为某人的一嗓子，把这群倒霉鸭子全吼下悬崖！

items.title: Ninja Cat Remewstered
items.short_description: You have nine lives. Make them count. Ninja Cat Remewstered is a challenging fast-paced platformer where a lone cat seeks to prove himself to the big bosses of the world.

items.title: 术阵魔法使 Demo
items.short_description: 术阵魔法使是一个结合了动作、下棋和Roguelite元素的2D冒险游戏。玩家操控魔法使艾拉娜布下术阵，发动魔法击退敌人。

items.title: Rally TS
items.short_description: Rally TS - The Ultimate Auto Simulator Experience Embark on an epic journey through the world of rally racing in TS Rally, where your dream of becoming the #1 racer in the Race of Champions begins with a single street car and rise to the global championship glory.

items.title: Blosharper：百花之战
items.short_description: 《Blosharper》是一款扭曲了花图（Hwatu）规则的老千模拟类Rogue卡牌构筑游戏。不要只凭运气——在残酷的地下赌场里，通过组合隐秘的“出老千”技能来操纵牌局，偿还巨额债务，击败冷酷无情的Boss，成为传说中的老千并活下去！

items.title: 天堂岛
items.short_description: 在这款由TechnoBrake制作的冒险游戏中，你被选为「珍宝大人」，必须收集17颗秘宝「金球」，获得岛上神明的认可！

items.title: Nightmare Farm
items.short_description: [一个痛苦的梦魇降临光明世界的故事] 让我们与参观农场的角色好好相处，给他们做饭，在田里种庄稼时给他们玩具。

items.title: 千职域界
items.short_description: Steam 稀缺纯单机复古 2D 横版卷轴冒险，复刻经典网游黄金质感，无氪金无内购无强制社交，畅享刷怪爆装、自由探索的纯粹横版乐趣。

items.title: Neostalker Demo
items.short_description: NEOSTALKER 是一款紧张的第一人称回合制解谜游戏，将爪钩移动、致命机械与战术规划结合在一系列危险的空间挑战中，带你深入一座已成为周围一切威胁的工厂核心。

items.title: SubPrime Delivery
items.short_description: Drag & Drop Various Action Blocks to Guide The Robot to The End of The Level!

items.title: 视差：闭眼过
items.short_description: 一款以蓄力跳跃为核心的2D精确平台跳跃游戏，玩家将在不断变化的几何关卡中，通过控制跳跃力度与距离判断完成精确移动，随着游戏推进，将逐步引入移动平台、距离误导等机制，克服挑战并抵达终点，体验逐步提升的难度曲线

items.title: Love Potions Suck: A Text Romance Demo
items.short_description: Love Potion Sucks is a text-based choice game about heartbreak, jealousy, and magic gone wrong. Make decisions as Rayne navigates school drama, awkward crushes, and a spellbook that promises love at a dangerous cost.

items.title: Secret Dice Demo
items.short_description: Roll dice, combine items, and unleash powerful synergies in this roguelike strategy game. With 20+ unique dice and 100+ items, build a brand-new strategy every run. The same dice can yield completely different results depending on your items. It's not luck — it's strategy!

items.title: Haven Restored
items.short_description: Restore neglected spaces through calming, hands-on cleaning while uncovering the quiet story of a life unfolding over time.

items.title: Hexilibrium
items.short_description: A logic puzzle game where you write code to guide a bot through hex grid levels. Use a simple built-in programming language, think algorithmically, and find elegant solutions to increasingly complex challenges.

items.title: FRCTL
items.short_description: FRCTL is a fast-paced arcade shooter roguelike. Its got combos and other cool stuff like complex enemies. Good time waster! also its FREEE!!!!!

items.title: FUNEX: Stock Market Simulator
items.short_description: FUNEX is the first and only STOCK MARKET SIMULATION which provides REAL ORDER BOOK TRADING to the players. You don't trade fake algoritmic prices on a fake market. Instead, there are 22 AI funds which are actively trading in a REAL SIMULATED STOCK EXCHANGE. Are you ready for REAL CHAOS?

items.title: Petko and the Black Island Demo
items.short_description: A classical 2D point & click adventure taking place on the eve of a tropical zombie apocalypse! Join world traveler Petko in this crazy adventure full of quirky characters and challenging puzzles!

items.title: Caroline's Underworld Demo
items.short_description: Navigate through a weird and whimsical underworld, meet interesting creatures and undead spirits, and solve puzzles to uncover the reason you’ve been sent here. Caroline’s Underworld is a 2D puzzle RPG that is inspired by the story of Alice in Wonderland, and is set in a fantastical version of hell.

items.title: SeongsuStation
items.short_description: 地狱般的地铁总是挡住去路！《SeongsuStation》是一款以现实地铁站为背景的沙雕硬核横版物理平台游戏。控制受制于物理法则、软塌塌的角色，突破各种奇葩反派和障碍，准时打卡上班！

items.title: Defracted
items.short_description: Defracted - The world is set in a fictional sci-fi realm where 2 teams are at war with each other over prosperity in a virtual reality game created by an alien civilization.

items.title: Laira Cut Me Open
items.short_description: Laira Cut Me Open 是款2D互动叙事游戏，关于一个女人的仇恨与恐惧。你要找到行凶者，皆因她把你开膛破肚，偷走了你身体的一部分，把你锁在精神病院里，抢走了你的丈夫、你的工作和你的钱。当她露面时，你要十倍奉还。

items.title: Path Defenders Demo
items.short_description: Path Defenders is a 3D action tower defense RPG. Build a strategy party and jump into real-time combat to fight alongside your summoned heroes against epic bosses, all driven by a lofi and vaporwave soundtrack.

items.title: Witchworker
items.short_description: Study hard, keep your atelier tidy and cast magical spells.

items.title: MAGE: Mega Awesome Gregarious Encounters
items.short_description: An action-packed 2D projectile fighter inspired by controller couch party classics. Master one of 21 unique Mages across over 200 maps in a simple but customizable and deep experience for up to 4 players local or online.

items.title: Our Dreadling
items.short_description: Step into the world of our little pink dreadling on its mission to uncover the enigmatic Monono. Our Dreadling is a minimalist platformer with Metroidvania-inspired exploration, delivering a unique blend of humor, storytelling, and surreal environments.

items.title: Venture
items.short_description: Two astronauts awaken on an alien planet. With only minutes of oxygen left, they must work together to scale staggering cliffs, study strange lifeforms, and search for a way home in this atmospheric co-op survival adventure.

items.title: Contrabandism Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Contrabandism Simulator 是一款以夜晚苏醒的港口为背景的黑暗氛围交易模拟游戏。 买入、卖出、谈判、承担风险，并独自度过每一个夜晚。

items.title: KON-PON SHMUP -Shapeshifter Showdown- Demo
items.short_description: A bullet hell shooting game with an outstanding sense of exhilaration. Dodge a variety of enemy attacks and aim to defeat the enemies! The enemies are cute fox girls. The player character is a tanuki girl (Sodeko). There are dialogue scenes before and after battles.

items.title: Layer Land / 莱尔兰德
items.short_description: 在 Layer Land，这个完整复刻地球地形的世界中，你可以通过传送门前往任何地方。捕捉怪物并将其变为宠物，与它们一起战斗、采集、制作，构建属于你的沙盒生存世界。通过 Layer Talk 与宠物实时交流，享受不间断的游戏体验。

items.title: Prism Wilds
items.short_description: You wake up on a beautiful island, with no memory of how you got there. Stranded, you and 6 strangers must survive, explore, and make this island your home all while uncovering that mystery. Farm, fish, build a home, decorate, form relationships, and uncover the truth hidden in the mountains.

items.title: Endless Defense Demo
items.short_description: Endless Defense 是一款科幻 roguelite 塔防游戏，每一局都会形成全新的构筑。放置炮塔，选择特质，抽取升级卡，利用特殊地块，并进化你的防线，抵御无尽的敌人、精英和首领浪潮。

items.title: 私たちはどう死のうか
items.short_description: A story-driven action game in which a hopeless high school girl confronts her life within her dreams as she turns 18, progressing through magnetic movement, exploration, dialogue, and combat.

items.title: Booya! Demo
items.short_description: Collect the letters B-O-O-Y-A to win. Booya is a chaotic party card game of stealing, bluffing, redirecting, and sabotaging your friends before they spell the word first.

items.title: Lone Voyage
items.short_description: You are the last living organism in the galaxy. Adrift and alone in a cold dark world you must scavenge for resources to keep your ship running, and arm your ship to prepare for the swarms arrival.

items.title: Glitchy: Not So Sweet
items.short_description: 这看起来像一个超级可爱的找不同游戏，但其实不是！

items.title: Wyldernook
items.short_description: Explore the secrets of the Wyldernook in a multiplayer trading card game for up to 4 players. Build decks around your favorite champions and outwit opponents in simultaneous turn gameplay that keeps every match strategic and engaging.

items.title: Nothing Can Go? Wrong! Demo
items.short_description: A top-down grid puzzle game where you play as Mr. Nothing. To reach the exit, you must transform into objects, combine items to craft tools, and interact with the environment. Think step-by-step, plan your routing, and see how your choices shape the grid.

items.title: Horse & Horse
items.short_description: 扮演被投入中世纪竞技场、为荣耀而战的战马。 近战、远程与魔法武器在快速而残酷的战斗中正面碰撞。 每一次失误都会付出代价，最终只会留下唯一的胜者。 Horse & Horse。最强的马获胜。

items.title: Nanma, A Tecelã das Sombras Demo
items.short_description: Nanma: A Tecelã das Sombras is a Brazilian dark high-fantasy visual novel where the loom of fate is in your hands. Take on the role of Nanma and discover whether your powers are a gift or a curse.

items.title: Legion of Judgment: Fallen Angel Demo
items.short_description: Legion of Judgment 是一款黑色电影风格（Noir）的动作角色扮演类银河战士恶魔城游戏（Action-RPG Metroidvania），提供全新且更深层次的玩家体验。探索遗忘的记忆以变得更强，在现实中经营一家酒店以创建一支强大的军团，并赢得对抗狼人公会的战争。

items.title: Journey to the King
items.short_description: Journey to the King is a 2D pixel art platformer inspired by classic platformer games. You play as a knight on a quest through dangerous lands to reach the kingdom and help the king who urgently awaits your arrival.

items.title: Shape Showdown
items.short_description: SHAPE SHOWDOWN is a arcade style fighter where enemies present with unique mechanics that increase in complexity as you progress. Attack, parry, and dodge with precise timing while learning each enemies patterns to win. Learn tight windows and increasingly interesting patterns to win fights faster.

items.title: Hell Runner
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 为精通而生的精密速通平台游戏。学习高压路线，解锁移动能力，反复挑战手工关卡，把每一秒都掌握在自己手里。

items.title: HOP-CO-OP
items.short_description: HOP-CO-OP 是一款第一人称连跳跑酷游戏。利用移动技巧通关高难度地图，与好友在线合作，使用道具战斗，自定义角色形象，并用关卡编辑器创建属于你的地图。

items.title: Boing!
items.short_description: Like Pong? Like Pinball? Like Boing! Be the ball in this deceptively challenging 3D platformer.

items.title: Paranormal Meatball Simulator
items.short_description: 一款关于被粘在天花板上的土耳其辣肉丸的疯狂超自然模拟游戏！在充满鬼魂、扭曲现实的物理效果以及宇宙UFO逃生计划的16天神秘循环中存活下来。在这之后，你将再也不会往天花板上扔食物了！

items.title: Bedtime Nightmare
items.short_description: Complete nightly tasks and keep the lights alive. Survive what lurks in the dark.

items.title: Hidden Raccoons in Asia
items.short_description: Hidden Raccoons in Asia 是一款温馨的找物游戏，背景设定在受亚洲美学启发的手工像素艺术场景中。探索细致的环境，放慢节奏，找出所有隐藏的浣熊。

items.title: Hidden Raccoons in Summer
items.short_description: Hidden Raccoons in Summer 是一款轻松的找物游戏，背景设定在充满夏日氛围的像素艺术世界中。按照自己的节奏探索阳光明媚的环境，找出所有的小浣熊。

items.title: Raccoon Packer: A Cozy Puzzle Game
items.short_description: 把调皮浣熊带来的各种奇怪物品打包吧！将所有物品完美摆放，贴上正确的标签，然后寄出去。一个温馨、令人满足又带点小混乱的解谜体验。

items.title: Volcano Logistics
items.short_description: 一款令人满足的第一人称渐进式物理游戏，玩家需经营废弃物处理厂，并为饥饿的火山提供燃料。赚取灵魂球并解锁地狱级升级。扩展你的平台，焚烧并摧毁各类物体。为恶魔上司效力，并揭开可疑货物背后的黑暗真相

items.title: Mystic Depths: The Corrupted King
items.short_description: Explore dark mines, oppressed cities, and ancient secrets in this atmospheric RPG set in Mystic Depths, where exploration, survival, and mystery intertwine beneath the shadow of the Baldemar Empire. The full game automatically detects and imports demo saves found on the same computer.

items.title: 涂涂卡牌 Demo
items.short_description: 《涂涂卡牌》是一款融合了策略卡牌 + 网格战场 + Roguelike 单局成长的回合制游戏。 你将通过染色、合成与贴纸，在不断恶化的战场上击败敌人，守住最后的可用空间。

items.title: There Is Nothing There
items.short_description: Narrative-driven psychological horror set in a confined apartment. Explore, interact with everyday objects, and notice increasingly unsettling changes around you. Your small, everyday choices will shape your future and define your ending. A debut title created by a solo developer.

items.title: Potter About
items.short_description: Help a broken flower pot find their place under the sun, exploring a beautiful, cozy home along the way. If you're looking for something bite-sized to play late at night, this is it. Navigate through the clustered rooms and wield peculiar, plant-inspired powers on this comfy, meditative adventure.

items.title: Public Fears - George's Farm
items.short_description: Felix Turner 被神秘力量迫使离开警队。他的朋友 George 劝他去自己偏远的农场避难。为了寻找平静，Felix 完全不知道等待他的是什么……

items.title: Knight Legion: Rpg Strategy
items.short_description: Lead 4 unique heroes and an army of 12 soldiers to reclaim 100 levels across 10 islands. Defend your monument, level up, upgrade gear, and craft powerful items in this action-packed RPG strategy. Will your legion cleanse the islands of the creature infestation?

items.title: JumpoCalypse
items.short_description: Jump. Die. Repeat. A brutally hard one-button platformer where every jump could be your last. How hard could a one-button game really be? Well buckle up, because you’re about to enter the Jumpocalypse.

items.title: Fun Park Simulator
items.short_description: 在这款第一人称模拟游戏中重建一座废弃的主题乐园。建造游乐设施、商店和装饰，让游客满意，赚取星级，解锁升级，雇佣员工，阻止捣乱者，把你的公园打造成著名景点。

items.title: Bug Drop
items.short_description: Fight, upgrade, and survive in a fast-paced top-down action roguelite where 20 unique heroes with special traits, weapons and abilities take on the swarm of alien bugs.

items.title: Kin Tandem
items.short_description: In Kin Tandem, a new local co-op adventure, take the role of a pair of feline siblings as they climb their way through a magic temple. Work in tandem to combine Barsa's brawn with Manu's spells as you solve challenges and defeat enemies.

items.title: Gene Crawl: Dungeon Descent
items.short_description: > 死亡。继承。进化。 突破地牢、打造装备、酿造药水、收集遗物，然后死亡，将你的基因传承给下一个世代，再深入下去。某种东西正在注视。每一次死亡都让你的血脉更强大。但谁从中获益？

items.title: WBS26 Demo
items.short_description: WBS26 is a wrestling promotion management simulator where you control shows, rosters, contracts, titles, finances, and backstage drama. Build stars, create rivalries, survive crises, and shape the future of your promotion. #BookItBetter

items.title: Patchkins Party
items.short_description: Patchkins is a multiplayer racing game for 2 to 6 players where you build the course as you play. Each round, players draw and place objects like Platforms, Obstacles, and Specials, then race to the finish without dying.

items.title: Deck Lite
items.short_description: 以复古简约的风格为主题，您将体验回合制卡牌构筑战斗。在战斗中，您需要精心制定策略，在造成可观伤害的同时保护自己。组合相同的卡牌可以创造出更强大的法术。

items.title: Tiny Cats vs Toys
items.short_description: 《Tiny Cats vs Toys》是一款隐藏物品游戏，玩家需要寻找小猫、解救被困在笼子里的猫咪，并消灭敌对玩具。

items.title: Sector 7
items.short_description: 在被监控笼罩的第七区，每一张卡牌都是一道两难抉择，每一次选择都将改写接下来的命运。以仁慈、铁腕、谋略或公正统治290桩分支案件。没有两次轮回会完全相同，20种结局等你揭晓。叙事Roguelike＋抉择改变一切——这个政权，能撑得比你更久吗？

items.title: Stone to Stove
items.short_description: 白天收集资源，服务他人赚取金钱；夜晚购买防御塔，保卫基地。优化你的定居点，承担风险以获取更多利润，每天抵御日益艰难的攻击，这将为你带来丰厚的回报。

items.title: Wing Walker
items.short_description: 在这款快节奏、考验技巧的平台游戏中，你需要奔跑、跳跃，并在移动的飞机上生存下来。你需要在飞机之间跳跃，掌握精准的时机，并努力在速度和混乱程度不断增加的情况下保持平衡，因为你知道，一个错误就会让你坠落。

items.title: Missile Man
items.short_description: A precision bullet-hell boss rush. Dodge 15 escalating attack types, chain perfect grazes into devastating combos, and strike during vulnerability windows across 28 handcrafted boss fights. Three difficulty modes, risk contracts, and deep upgrade progression keep every run fresh.

items.title: DarkStone Restoration
items.short_description: Darkstone Restoration brings the classic action RPG back to modern PCs with improved stability, compatibility, controls, readability, and quality-of-life improvements — while preserving the spirit of the original game.

items.title: Project: Firmament
items.short_description: PROJECT: FIRMAMENT is a top-down horde shooter where you blast through missions using a unique aiming system that puts quick-minded positioning, map knowledge, and loadout planning as the main contributors to your success.

items.title: Orb of Creation
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 1,509 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: Orb of Creation is an active incremental-puzzle game in which you recreate the world with nothing but magic and ingenuity. Conjure resources, buy upgrades, and become an all-powerful wizard!

items.title: Dark Age Gladiator
items.short_description: 帝国与魔物共存的混沌时代。作为一名尚无名气的角斗士，站在竞技场上，穿越血战，赢得声名。这是一部剑与魔法交织的黑暗奇幻动作RPG。

items.title: A Game About AI
items.short_description: 建造吞噬世界的机器。扩张你的 AI 基础设施，榨干资源，动摇人类——系统逐步崩溃，水源枯竭，战争点燃，没有什么能阻止你已启动的进程。

items.title: How To Grow a Black Hole
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 56 篇用户评测中有 80% 为好评。
items.short_description: How To Grow a Black Hole 讲的是……嗯……如何养大一个黑洞。管理你的黑洞，喂食以增加质量，并防止灾难性坍缩。与全球玩家或好友竞争，打造最大的黑洞。也许你会成为第一名。

items.title: Caravan Village: Farming Life
items.short_description: Turn a scam into an empire! In Caravan Village, farm crops, raise animals, mine for resources, and renovate abandoned caravans into luxury suites. Recover your grandma's lost cookbook, cook delicious meals, and charm your guests in this open-ended life RPG. Create your own vacation paradise!

items.title: Blacksmith Idle
items.short_description: Blacksmith Idle 是一款轻松休闲的放置游戏，你将经营属于自己的铁匠铺，解锁新物品，管理库存，购买升级，并通过飞升在每一轮中成长得更快。精通每一件物品，或者一路追逐超大数字。

items.title: Code Tycoon
items.short_description: 从 1980 年的车库起步,打造你的软件帝国。解锁从 BASIC 到 Python 的编程语言,开发项目,招募程序员,升级办公室。在这款 tycoon 模拟游戏中,设法在期限、bug 与要求严苛的客户之间生存下来。

items.title: BRINE Demo
items.short_description: Something smells fishy in Cornwall. A mutated, violent uprising of local seafood has surged from the depths, claiming the coast for themselves. At the centre stands a disgruntled fisherman. Fight through quintessentially Cornish environments in retro FPS flair. Half the res, double the fun!

items.title: Chrono CCG
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 66 篇用户评测中有 53% 为好评。
items.short_description: Chrono CCG is an indie game from genre veterans where time-traveling agents battle for control of history. Timelines shift mid-match, agents evolve, and deep strategy meets accessible play. For the community, by the community.

items.title: Kill the Slimes
items.short_description: 只需移动，其余交给自动——击败史莱姆、赚金币、不断强化自己。

items.title: Beggar's Road
items.short_description: A darkly comic medieval roguelike where you travel between towns, recruit desperate companions, and survive strange encounters through difficult choices, scarce resources, and shifting alliances with bishops, merchants, and bandits.

items.title: Bouncy Brawl
items.short_description: A fast-paced run-and-gun platformer set in a dynamically generating, unforgiving world. Climb endlessly to escape the deadly void below, unleash your abilities, and dodge through intense enemy crossfire to achieve the highest score.

items.title: RESHOOTER
items.short_description: 《RESHOOTER》带来令人心跳加速的射击动作，将经典街机玩法提升到全新高度。沉浸于复古节奏之中，体验电力十足的视觉效果、沉浸式音效与引人入胜的游戏机制。

items.title: SUITE:The Automated Card Engine
items.short_description: SUITE：Automated Card Engine 是一款扑克类 Roguelike 游戏。经营大量工坊，使用损坏的卡牌和怪异的小丑，组合出数十种扑克牌型，赚取筹码，成为超级富豪。

items.title: Hanox
items.short_description: 同时滑动所有方块，按正确的重量顺序堆叠，在围绕惯性、规划与连锁合并设计的精巧网格谜题中找到完美解法。

items.title: 键来
items.short_description: 这是一款融合打字交互、动作Roguelike与塔防的创新游戏。通过敲击键盘进行爽快战斗，在紧张刺激的游戏中纠正打字姿势并养成盲打肌肉记忆。什么？不喜欢打字？要不要尝试下用键盘按键来打牌！你还能玩到打字+Roguelike+老虎机的卡牌策略模式！

items.title: Internet Cafe Tycoon
items.short_description: Run a 2000s-era LAN cafe. Hire a literal ghost apprentice, dodge municipal inspections, keep rival groups from fighting on your bench, and ride the chaos through a 30-day campaign. Pixel-art tycoon with three difficulty modes and a free demo waiting for you.

items.title: Dave's Word Game
items.short_description: A daily word game. Find words, clear rows and columns, aim for the highest score you can. A new board every day!

items.title: HEAVYDELIC
items.short_description: HEAVYDELIC is a 2D Slavic Synthpunk Platformer broadcasting on dead frequencies. Synthetic psychedelia, comic art, VHS tapes, analog ruins & robots resurrected from Slavic mythology. Every asset is manually drawn by Eniac. Signal lost. Game found.

items.title: Mythic Love: Iberian Legends
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 21 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 你以为和西班牙传说中的生物谈恋爱很简单吗？❤️‍🔥 小心：在 Mythic Love: 伊比利亚传说 里，赌上的可不只是你的心。

items.title: Postin Paradise
items.short_description: Chill, relax... and stamp! Postin Paradise is a satisfactory incremental game where you work as post office manager. Grab the mail, stamp it, throw it into the hole, collect your coins, and repeat. At night, when your shift ends, you can buy upgrades to improve your performance. Stamp 'em all!

items.title: Recess
items.short_description: A chaotic multiplayer party game where childhood playground games turn into all-out competition. Tag, hide, chase, and outplay your friends across imaginative maps all before the bell rings.

items.title: The Grid.
items.short_description: Four original puzzle games — words, logic, and patterns — wrapped in a single elegant arcade package.

items.title: Frutz
items.short_description: Blast through five worlds, claim the Cosmic Gems, defeat Lord Zorkannan, and master every run in this fast arcade shooter.

items.title: Doodle Dice Monsters
items.short_description: Doodle Dice Monsters is a strategic turn-based battling game where you draw your own characters! Form your six character dream team, then duel your friends in strategic multiplayer combat. Winner gets to steal one of the defeated Doodlemon for themself!

items.title: Glowbot Tower Defense
items.short_description: Competitive endless sci-fi tower defense game with global leaderboards where you strategically place and upgrade Glowbots to stop waves of enemies across vibrant space maps.

items.title: Spellfall: Last Mage Standing Demo
items.short_description: Spellfall: Last Mage Standing is a fast paced top-down arena brawler where 6 mages draft spells and items across 5 rounds and battle to be the last mage standing. This demo allows players to experience Spellfall's core arena combat in practice matches vs. bot opponents.

items.title: One Last Box
items.short_description: One Last Box is a short indie first-person horror game. You have just been hired as a package sorter for a mysterious company. Examine boxes based on clues, decide whether to accept or return them, but be aware... you are not completely alone here.

items.title: Chessillo
items.short_description: A roguelike deck-building tactical game fused with chess. Choose a cursed Prince, collect pieces with magical abilities, and conquer three acts of boss encounters where the board itself fights against you.

items.title: Condemned to Clean
items.short_description: 你不是出于热情，而是因为判决成为清洁工。 Condemned to Clean 是单人模拟游戏，恢复省城海滩。 探索，收集垃圾，偿还债务，为更伟大目标做小事！

items.title: Scientific project: Optic
items.short_description: 《Scientific Project: Optic》 是一款第一人称解谜游戏，将带您穿越光学科学的发展史，从最初的哲学启蒙一路探索至现代的科学认知。掌握光的本质，解开那些受真实科学发现启发的精妙谜题。

items.title: Sticker Buds
items.short_description: Sticker Buds! The personality quiz with personality!

items.title: SLOTMANIA
items.short_description: A tiny slot machine that lives on your desktop. Pull the lever, watch the reels spin, win coins, and upgrade your machine between microbreaks. Move it, hide it, or bring it back whenever you’re in need of one more spin.

items.title: Climber and The Ice Tower
items.short_description: Climber and The Ice Tower is a 2D pixel art platform game where your goal is to overcome each challenge to save the animals of the village!!!

items.title: Deskdragora Demo
items.short_description: Deskdragora is a virtual pet game that lives in the corner of your desktop. While you work, study, or browse the internet, your little magical mandragora grows, produces magic, and keeps you company throughout the day.

items.title: Space Cat Arcade Adventure
items.short_description: A chill arcade-style space runner where every run ends in discovery.

items.title: DEADWAVE
items.short_description: 多人游戏，搭载僵尸模式。杀敌赚取积分购买强力武器、收集稀有或普通道具、升级生命值与护甲，生存下去以解锁精美地图。

items.title: Retro Madness DX
items.short_description: Retro Madness DX is a fast-paced retro FPS inspired by classic arcade shooters and top-down action games. Fight through procedurally generated rooms,uncover secrets, and survive relentless waves of enemies in a stylish pixel-art world where no two runs are ever the same.

items.title: Scratch Off!
items.short_description: 刮刮乐遇上Roguelike。组建牌组，收集硬币，刮出你的房租。每局都不同，每次刮都很重要。

items.title: Bit
items.short_description: In Bit, you play as Bit. A little pixel alone in the void. Bit has the urge to climb. Why does he want to climb? Find out with him across 10 unique worlds and help him find his purpose.

items.title: Stealth Operative Syn: Virtual Training
items.short_description: Synthia “Syn” is training to become a Stealth Operative. In order to do so, she trains in the Virtual Simulation Room. Use different tactics and techniques to sneak past the guards and obstacles. Finish every level to complete your virtual training to become a Stealth Operative!

items.title: Sloop
items.short_description: A fast-paced, sea-faring, adventure where you’ll have to learn to turn. Brave the waters!

items.title: Dart Racer
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Dart Racer is a N64-styled arcade pod racer where the tracks are extreme and gravity is a joke. Master challenging circuits, upgrade your vehicle, and defeat your rivals. Jump into the cockpit, unleash the full power of your machine, and dominate the galaxy! Also available in VR.

items.title: Clank-Robotics
items.short_description: Build your own robot. Program your robots AI in the Visual Scripting logic editor. Compete against other people's robots in the ranked arena. Build the strongest and smartest robot and win.

items.title: Group Chaos Bottaring
items.short_description: Ridiculous on the outside, deadly serious in combat. A chaotic co-op 3D action game for up to 20 players. Fight through absurd enemies, giant weapons, and screen-filling chaos using 8 unique attacks and deep customization.

items.title: GLiTCHiA
items.short_description: GLiTCHiA is an adventure that blends a 2D retro game with a 3D horror space. Keep an eye on what's behind you, then use gimmicks and glitches to find what matters as you explore a lost series. Uncover why the ending went wrong, and save the game's protagonist, Aby.
developers: Midori Games / みどりげーむず
publishers: Midori Games / みどりげーむず

items.title: Stronghold 4《要塞4》试玩版
items.short_description: 需要木材！在这款讲述初代“城堡模拟”游戏故事的前传中，重返《要塞》的原始森林。沉浸在电影般的战役中，在遭遇战模式中运用新机制磨练你的攻城技艺，并用琳琅满目的城堡部件和装饰品打造你的专属城堡。

items.title: Sixth Force
items.short_description: 在《Sixth Force》中，一条能量纽带将你们紧紧相连，也赋予你们超能力。漂浮、摆荡、拉拽彼此，用能量鞭定住障碍、挑战古怪敌人，在甜蜜混乱中边跑边解谜——只是糖衣之下，似乎藏着更奇怪的东西。

items.title: RobotSurvivors
items.short_description: 三台机器人，一个泰坦，无尽敌潮。 实时切换 Vanguard、Storm 与 Striker，施展华丽连携。 将三台机器人合体为终极兵器 Titan，横扫失控机械大军。 一款节奏紧凑、爽快刺激的俯视角幸存者动作游戏。

items.title: Quadrix
items.short_description: 在这款高节奏的方块罗格列特游戏中，用混沌的卡牌协同效应主宰盘面。弯曲物理法则，逆转盘面崩溃，并触发打破常规的强大连击。征服在线PvP、合作模式以及100关的战役模式。抽牌。颠覆这个游戏。

items.title: Jolt: Neon Breaker
items.short_description: 在这款高速霓虹打砖块游戏中直接操控小球。升级你的能力，释放毁灭性技能，在这场令人沉浸的街机体验中击碎成群砖块。

items.title: Sludge Department
items.short_description: A murky point-and-click puzzle game where a straightforward repair job gets stranger the deeper you go. Solve 2D and 3D puzzles, meet weird characters, and figure out what is happening below the sludge.

items.title: SKY LEGENDS - An Aeropostal Epic
items.short_description: Play as the iconic pioneers of aviation and fly their legendary aircraft. Between human challenges and technical feats, cross the extreme landscapes of the Sahara, the Andes, or the Atlantic in an immersive, narrative, and historical virtual reality adventure.

items.title: Enter the Depths
items.short_description: Enter the Depths is a minimalistic dice-building roguelike. Customize your dice, collect powerful relics, and battle through an ever-shifting dungeon to confront the Void.

items.title: Dimhaven - The Lost Source
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 25 篇用户评测中有 84% 为好评。
items.short_description: 准备好踏上冒险的旅途了吗？这款第一人称悬疑游戏由《Quern》的团队开发。走进晦港的世界，迎接挑战、探索未知、破解谜题，享受叙事驱动的体验。拿起相机，展现你的智慧！

items.title: Ape-tite Demo
items.short_description: 在节奏飞快的本地合作厨房中穿梭于混乱之间，空间狭小、压力不断。

items.title: Sovereign's End
items.short_description: 感觉自己所向无敌。直到你不再无敌。一款黑暗风格的 3D 太空幸存者like，拥有深度的构筑玩法与自动开火的技能。 熬过潮水般涌来的敌群，直面 Sovereign。前提是，你撑得到那一刻。

items.title: Mythic Manager
items.short_description: The front office sports experience — but for an MMORPG guild. Scout talent, manage your roster, win arena tournaments, build raid teams, and climb the rankings one boss kill at a time.

items.title: The Songtail Society Demo
items.short_description: Join the Songtail Society, A Roguelike card game rpg where nobles, performers, and royalty alike take the stage, to create a wonderful and different show every time.

items.title: Road To Glory
items.short_description: 执掌一家足球俱乐部，在做出最佳决策以书写你的传奇的同时，成为一位令人钦佩（或饱受质疑）的领袖。

items.title: G.O.D. Global Orbital Defense Demo
items.short_description: Take control of the G.O.D. system, the U.P.A.’s tactical satellite. Orbiting in silence above Vel’Aris, your mission is to protect the planet from every threat. Manage orbital fire. But remember: G.O.D. sees everything... even what you wish remained buried.

items.title: 三国义
items.short_description: 单人开发2个月，《三国义》是一款 2D 回合制卡牌肉鸽。乱世之中，你将扮演一方诸侯，征战八州四十九城。布阵、出牌、劝降、军旗、化身觉醒——每一次抉择都在重塑你的牌组、武将与天命。八州各异，千变万化，没有两局相同的征途。

items.title: GeneBloom
items.short_description: 一款温馨的植物育种大亨游戏，你种植和销售基因独特的花朵。培育更强壮的植物，解锁强大的升级，用你懒洋洋的猫和忠诚的小鸟抵御害虫，并满足挑剔的客户。

items.title: S+ Universe
items.short_description: S+ Universe 是融合了动作游戏玩法的视觉小说。 体验剧情章节，探索社区的创意作品，或使用关卡编辑器和Steam创意工坊打造并分享你的作品。

items.title: Wave 43
items.short_description: 捕捉鱼类。变得更强。打破海洋。打造疯狂连击，攀登排行榜。

items.title: Destined Notes : The Written Fate Demo
items.short_description: A massacre. A past that won’t stay buried. As Daniel, dive into a chilling investigation that spirals into pure horror. Explore, solve, survive—but something is watching. The deeper you go, the lesser you escape.

items.title: Grids of Thermometers
items.short_description: 《温度计网格》让你只需动动指尖，就能体验纸笔逻辑游戏的轻松乐趣。 在每个关卡中，你都要用水银填充温度计网格。 网格边沿的数字表示每行和每列中必须填充多少单元格。

items.title: Garbage Growth
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 21 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: Garbage Growth是一款简短的增量垃圾游戏，关于收集人们的垃圾、香蕉甚至婴儿来赚钱，并让世界污染得更严重。雇佣老鼠，增长你的污染, 让一切变得更糟!

items.title: Night Hike
items.short_description: A short point-and-click adventure game about memories and choices. Exploring some woods, finding perspective, and peace.

items.title: 男孩与鹿
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 32 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款充满诗意、如同电影般的平台游戏中，一个离家出走的小男孩遇到了一只小鹿。随着友谊的不断加深，他们的能力也将提升。这段旅途的情感重量也在日益增长，达到“无声胜有声”的境界。

items.title: Project L33T: Founders Edition
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 481 篇用户评测中有 53% 为好评。
items.short_description: Join the persistent open world of OZERSK! Choose your way to play on PvE or PvP servers, fight for precious loot and gear, and risk it all in a hostile environment. Die, lose all your gear and loot, then return to the same server in hopes of retrieving what you lost. This is your story!

items.title: Tile Blast Royale
items.short_description: Minesweeper became a turn-based battle royale. Move your hero, open tiles, claim territory, steal enemy ground, and survive Sudden Death in online or local multiplayer.

items.title: Keep It Running: Together
items.short_description: Keep an old haunted factory running at all costs in this horrifying co-op survive-the-night game. Keep the Boss happy and fend off the monsters that haunt the factory and the town as you race to produce and deliver cursed children's toys.

items.title: Gatekeeper Simulator: Inner Circle
items.short_description: You guard the gate of a secret society. Every visitor lies, some better than others. Inspect, decide, and live with the consequences of who you let inside.

items.title: Drink Factory Simulator - Prologue
items.short_description: 从零开始建立你的饮料帝国！🍹 尝试配方，找到完美配比，扩展工厂，完成大额订单。每一滴都由你决定！

items.title: County Hospital Outbreak
items.short_description: Co-op or solo sci-fi horror. Purge a biological outbreak with flamethrowers & grenades. Explore infested zones, grab keycards & stuff, then trigger the protocol to burn the Mother Organism. Team up. Erase the threat

items.title: RAZE
items.short_description: 《RAZE》是一款基于随机性的动作Roguelike游戏。在单次游戏中消灭数千乃至数万名敌人，适应随机事件，凭借猫一般的反应能力生存下来。这里没有捷径，也没有犯错的余地。

items.title: JACK: 1 % BATTERY - A Detective Thriller
items.short_description: Experience a race against time written by a former forensic investigation expert. As detective JACK, you are the last hope to rescue the US President's kidnapped daughter. With only 1% battery left on her phone, use authentic detective techniques to find her before the screen goes black.

items.title: The Witch Shoot
items.short_description: Fight through a cursed voodoo swamp in this fast-paced Roguelite Bullet Hell. Build powerful upgrades, survive relentless enemy hordes, and rescue your kidnapped dog from the Voodoo Master.

items.title: Cart by Cart: Supermarket Simulator
items.short_description: 经营一家温馨的超市吧。购买货架和商品，为店铺补货，迎接顾客，并在收银台扫描商品。处理现金或刷卡支付，找零准确无误，让你的生意日益兴旺。

items.title: The Queen's Gondola
items.short_description: Stuck on the Queen’s royal aircraft, you have been trapped in a mystical loop fueled by dark magic. Armed with nothing but your wits, keep an eye out for anomalies, and you might just find an escape.

items.title: 厨房清洁大师
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 109 篇用户评测中有 88% 为好评。
items.short_description: 化身美食小英雄，向发霉污渍宣战！握紧你的高压喷枪，切换最精准的喷嘴，在这一场充满治愈感的街机冒险中，将冰箱里的黏腻污垢一扫而空。

items.title: Ancient Adventure
items.short_description: Venture forth! Kill the Monsters! Evil has taken over the world. Equip your Weapons of Choice. Journey out into the world to avenge your predecessors. Survive the hordes, seek out to extinguish the source of all Evil, so that one day, your people may finally live in peace.

items.title: Hardcore Soldier
items.short_description: Vengeance or Die in this no mercy, bullet hell, run and gun shooter that requires player skill, with only one life and one hit death, game over. You just can't get hit.

items.title: Getting Home
items.short_description: A space landing adventure about love and perseverance. Master precision controls, conserve fuel, and navigate deadly cosmic hazards on a journey to find your way home.

items.title: Rift Wizard 3
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 27 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Rift Wizard is a hardcore combat strategy roguelike and wizard simulator featuring an extremely deep build system. Customize your Wizard with more than 500 spells and magical artifacts. Blast, summon, or enchant your way through 20 levels of pure turn based chaos.

items.title: No Luck In Dice
items.short_description: The Dice-Inspired Roguelike. No Luck In Dice is the out-of-this-world deckbuilder where you use Dice to score against cosmic entities. Weigh the dice in your favor and use Cosmic Cards to break the game in this out-of-this-world experience!

items.title: National Transit
items.short_description: 沙盒策略游戏。建设国家交通网络，发展经济，提升人民生活水平。每张地图均为程序生成，独一无二。

items.title: Runeveil
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 92% 为好评。
items.short_description: 排序策略肉鸽游戏。作为元素巫师步入竞技场，打造强大的符文链，利用狂野的遗物协同效应打破游戏平衡。通过所有试炼，击败诸王，晋升成神。魔法即混沌，秩序即力量！

items.title: Mini Murder Mysteries
items.short_description: Solve cozy, crafty whodunits. Puzzle your way through nine unique investigations – and use your noggin to make intelligent deductions. Explore the evidence, scrutinize statements, and connect the dots.

items.title: Disc Golf Masters
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 35 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
items.short_description: The disc golf game built for people who actually play disc golf. Throw real licensed discs, pick your angles, play online, and chase the leaderboards. Made by disc golfers. Updated constantly.

items.title: Night Duty Log: A Shōwa School Record
items.short_description: 一部以昭和时代日本学校为舞台的短篇心理恐怖作品。 在夜晚的学校中，你逐渐意识到自己并不孤单。在探索教室和走廊的过程中，你开始察觉到异常现象。你的选择将影响故事的发展，并引导你走向多个不同的结局。 一款可在短时间内游玩的多结局心理恐怖体验。

items.title: TetraPlinko
items.short_description: Tetra-Plinko is a high-energy physics puzzler that collides two classic arcade games! Drop blocks strategically to navigate a peg-filled board, unleash massive multiplier combos, and watch the chaos unfold. Rack up points in this addictive, fast-paced mashup of strategy and gravity!

items.title: Endless Defense
items.short_description: Endless Defense 是一款科幻 roguelite 塔防游戏，每一局都会形成全新的构筑。放置炮塔，选择特质，抽取升级卡，利用特殊地块，并进化你的防线，抵御无尽的敌人、精英和首领浪潮。

items.title: Microwave Simulator
items.short_description: An absurd sandbox where you put random objects in a oven and see what happens. Heat, melt, explode, or discover the unexpected.

items.title: KSEF ❤️
items.short_description: You are Janusz, a 47-year-old Polish business owner. Your mission: issue one e-invoice through KSeF before 5 PM. A Windows XD bureaucracy simulator with 15 apps, 30+ random interruptions, multiple endings, and disco polo.

items.title: SCP: Mr. Jupiter
items.short_description: A first-person SCP horror adventure where you survive a catastrophic containment breach, explore a collapsing facility, and evade the mysterious Mr. Jupiter.

items.title: Tomatito's Culinary Pizza Adventure
items.short_description: Help Tomatito make a delicious pizza! Dough, cheese, onion and... watch out for the slippery spots!

items.title: Voltage High Society
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 91 篇用户评测中有 93% 为好评。
items.short_description: 第一人称银河恶魔城，用拳头战斗。没有枪。探索爬满电子改造恐怖生物的监狱岛，从这座岛屿本身获取新能力，一路用拳头打出自由。灵感来自铁男:金属兽。

items.title: Nodwar
items.short_description: NODWAR is here to meet all your strategic needs at once. Classic: Arcade Strategy - conquer, merge and upgrade nodes. Aeon: Grand Strategy - conquer an entire planet. Crux: Traditional Real-Time Strategy experience where you command individual units on a battlefield. Easy or hard, your choice.

items.title: Idle Crown
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款中世纪放置RPG中,从农奴一路登顶为君主。修炼十五种技能,一砖一石营建领地,斩飞龙、屠利维坦,统御工人,步步为营直取王座。100项成就,39个排行榜,没有体力条,无需等待。

items.title: Rogue Mate
items.short_description: 一款肉鸽国际象棋 RPG，你的棋子不会一成不变。赢取强化、解锁分支技能树，在一局局对战中打造你的部队，闯过 10 场首领战，每一场都重写规则，只为将你拆解。

items.title: REWOUND
items.short_description: 《REWOUND》是一款第一人称VR叙事探索游戏。玩家将以黑猫视角，通过物品互动与时间回溯，探索患有阿尔茨海默症的小说家逐渐消逝的记忆世界。

items.title: The Light that Binds Us
items.short_description: Dive into The Light That Binds Us, a puzzle-adventure game where light shapes reality. Play as Yuè, a tormented soul, accompanied by her faithful protector, Yún. Cast shadows into paths, reshape the world to solve puzzles, explore breathtaking environments, and uncover the past that binds you!

items.title: Echoes of Above
items.short_description: An action game where you strike back — literally. Hit enemy projectiles mid-air, deflect their force and use the environment to survive. Master precision combat across two difficulty modes in a mythical world abandoned by the gods. Every shot fired at you is a weapon waiting to be reclaimed.

items.title: Paper Paws
items.short_description: Paper Paws — a cozy card collecting game about kittens! Scratch, clean, laminate and collect all the cats in your album. Can you collect them all?

items.title: Big Breakfast 2 Demo
items.short_description: In a world without Breakfast, one man decides to challenge fate! The debut RPG from Stahmpin' Grounds Studios, Big Breakfast 2, is an old-school turn-based RPG in the style of classic fantasy RPGs from the 8 bit era.

items.title: FrogStray
items.short_description: A tough, precise platformer. Guide a lost frog home using charged jumps and wall-kicks through hand-crafted, obstacle-filled levels. A pure challenge of skill.

items.title: Maple Ridge
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: After losing his wife in an accident, Alex is left alone in a suburban house where every little detail reminds him of the past. An ordinary evening quickly turns into a series of strange and unsettling events.

items.title: 猫呜地理
items.short_description: 《猫呜地理》是同名拼图桌游的电子版。你将化身为猫咪徒步者，完成一次徒步旅行，通过放置不同景色板块完成各种拍摄任务，积攒足迹分数。这短短21天的旅行，将留下难忘的回忆……在电子版中，你还可以能解锁更多挑战玩法，刷新自己探索高分。

items.title: Stamp Collector
items.short_description: Stamp Collector ​是​一​款​轻松且​令​人​满意​的​收藏​模拟​游戏。​使用​印章​打孔器​对​收藏​物品​进行​打孔，​并​将​产生​的​印章​加入​你​的​收藏​中。​探索​新​的​主题，​并​逐步​一​步​步​扩展​你​的​收藏。

items.title: Notebook Workshop
items.short_description: 管理​你​自己​的​可爱​笔​记​本​商​店！​在​你​的​工作​坊​中​创造​独特​的​设计，​仔细​打​包​订单，​用​与​众​不同​的​风格​让​顾客​满意。​发展​你​的​小生意，​成为​城市​中​最​受​欢迎​的​笔记​本​商店​之一。

items.title: 桌宠奶茶店：放置大亨
items.short_description: 一款融合了桌宠功能的可爱风奶茶店增量游戏。挂机赚钱，自由摆放，让你的桌面不再孤单。

items.title: Aiya Desire Demo
items.short_description: 探索 × 音游 × 恐怖冒险！？ 平息“感染恐慌”的奇迹装置——HC（Harmony Chip）。为了追查母亲之死与父亲失踪，少女 Aiya 前往无线电塔“Sentinel”。探索、解谜、对话，甩开穷追不舍的敌人，并在双键节奏 Boss 战中揭开 HC 的真相。 父亲是敌人吗？ 还是站在她这边？ HC 真的拯救了人类吗？ 又或者，它隐藏着某个至今无人察觉的秘密？ 少女 Aiya 无处可逃的噩梦，就此开始……

items.title: Busy Bar - World Tour
items.short_description: Serve drinks, survive ridiculous guests, upgrade your bars, and buy out rival moguls — solo or in co-op — in a chill bar empire game where every shift ends in progress.

items.title: ZrOth
items.short_description: Use your resources to capture locations in this management game. Each location will give you different resources and effects. Create your own build to gather as many resources as possible to pay ZrOth’s tribute, but be careful, he’s getting greedier and greedier.

items.title: Tetrabeasts
items.short_description: 在 Tetrabeasts 中指挥一支怪物战团，这款游戏是经典下落方块解谜与激烈战术怪物战斗的爆炸性融合。组建致命的战斗阵线，清除行以释放对敌方城堡的毁灭性攻击，并在无情的反击中生存。锻造你的军队。掌握方块。征服王国。

items.title: 도깨비의 밤
items.short_description: 《도깨비의 밤》은 한국 전래동화풍 세계관에서 펼쳐지는 호러 탈출 어드벤처 게임입니다. 당신은 알 수 없는 이유로 도깨비의 세계에 갇히게 됩니다. 어둠 속을 탐색하고, 곳곳에 숨겨진 단서와 아이템을 찾아 이 기묘한 밤에서 벗어나세요. 도깨비가 머무는 밤, 당신은 무사히 현실로 돌아갈 수 있을까요?

items.title: Bulletreign: Survivors
items.short_description: 俯视角军事弹幕生存游戏。驾驶装甲车辆深入敌后，营救战俘，融合毁灭性武器，一路突进。25种武器、9种融合、6名队员。每一局都是全新的攻势。

items.title: 深空幸存者：无尽星域 Demo
items.short_description: 《深空幸存者：无尽星域》是一款类幸存者游戏。你的星际战舰意外进入未知宇宙，在无尽的敌人包围中杀出一条血路，漫游多个星域，收集陨石资源打造你的终极轨道武器。

items.title: 恶魇
items.short_description: 《BOTMARE》是一款复古硬核克苏鲁风格第一人称射击游戏，支持单人游玩、本地分屏合作及 Steam 远程同乐。在限时任务中收集代币、启动遗迹机关、护送同伴，迎战各类魔物与强敌。丰富武器、战术道具搭配写实弹道系统，每一轮冒险都充满全新挑战与紧张氛围。

items.title: 阿弥陀佛
items.short_description: 《阿弥陀佛》是一款以佛法为背景的动作角色扮演游戏，玩家将化身为一位“菩萨”，为了救赎困于边地的刚强众生，你将踏上一条充满喜怒哀乐的娑婆之路。

items.title: Comfort Food: A Taste of Courage Demo
items.short_description: Comfort Food: A Taste of Courage is a fast-paced, action-packed cooking game. Roast, fry, and sizzle a variety of dishes to complete orders and earn money before rent is due! Embark on this culinary quest of courage as Teal reheats her passion for cooking again!

items.title: Infinite Arcana Demo
items.short_description: 免费试玩《无限秘仪》Demo：开放前 60 个节点、5 张地图，体验秘仪转轮战斗、石头构筑、商店、休整、祭坛、魔女和风险路线选择。

items.title: The Boo Club Demo
items.short_description: 《鬼怪俱乐部》是一款支持 1–4 名玩家合作游玩的闹鬼豪宅冒险游戏。 探索一座闹鬼豪宅，寻找仪式祭坛，并在怪物大军的袭击下完成一场危险的驱魔仪式！ 运用团队合作、快速反应以及大量疯狂有趣的道具，一起驱逐豪宅中的邪恶力量！

items.title: 下潜：深海回声
items.short_description: 从潜水钟脆弱的安全中下潜至黑暗的沉船区域，搜寻沉没的黄金，在不断升级的异常中求生，并揭开究竟是什么一次次把你拖回深海。

items.title: Puzzle Art
items.short_description: Puzzle Art 是一款精美且轻松的 2D 拼图游戏。探索从野生动物到奇幻童话的多种画廊，拼凑出令人惊叹的艺术作品。可自由调整难度，并按照自己的节奏完成收藏！

items.title: 陨落者要塞
items.short_description: 白天建造，夜晚求生。 一款聚焦决策、每一次选择都不可逆的中世纪塔防游戏。

items.title: 내 방에서만큼은 누구나 철학자
items.short_description: 는 게임 속 소년이 사춘기 시절 누구나 한 번쯤 품게 되는 질문들을 던지고, 플레이어가 질문에 답하며 소년의 생각을 함께 받아들이는 텍스트 게임입니다.

items.title: 孟德尔模拟器
items.short_description: 《孟德尔模拟器：花卉杂交》是一款硬核又治愈的植物遗传学模拟经营游戏。核心玩法与特色：​真正的基因遗传算法（非随机拼图） 。游戏内置了一套严谨的遗传学模拟系统。显性基因（AA）、隐性基因（aa）与共显性遗传（Aa）将真实决定后代性状。 8种颜色，12种花型，共96种花等你来发现和收集！

items.title: Dawn Bell
items.short_description: 睁开眼，映入眼帘的是一座陌生的古堡——。 《Dawn Bell》是一款横版2D恐怖冒险游戏。玩家将扮演一名失去记忆的少女，在阴森的古堡中展开探索。请利用收集到的道具与情报，解开重重谜团与机关，追寻少女失去的过去。 你的选择与行动将极大程度地影响故事的结局。这是一款拥有多结局系统的作品。 少女失去的过去究竟是什么？最终抵达的真相又是如何？在记忆之门开启的尽头，究竟有什么在等待着她——。

items.title: SHED
items.short_description: 挑战你的朋友。烧掉整副牌。SHED一切。 SHED是一款竞技类出牌游戏，你的目标很简单：在对手之前把所有牌都打出去。

items.title: Tech Empire
items.short_description: A single-player business simulation about running a technology company. You act as its CEO, CTO, and CFO at the same time: building products, managing staff and finances, going public, and competing with rival firms.

items.title: Nestify: Cozy Design
items.short_description: Nestify 是一款温馨的沙盒房间设计和装饰游戏，你可以在游戏中绘制布局图、布置室内装潢，并通过调整颜色、光照、大小和旋转来定制物品。利用音乐、天气和风景营造轻松的氛围。放松身心，打造属于你自己的温馨小窝。

items.title: Celestia
items.short_description: A real-time 3D space simulator and interactive planetarium. Travel to any planet, moon, star, or galaxy and view it from any point in space and time. Accelerate time, land on alien worlds, and expand the universe with community-made add-ons.

items.title: Foedus - Rise of the Allies Demo
items.short_description: Experience the tactical combat of Foedus: Rise of the Allies in this combat-focused demo. Lead your heroes through a dangerous battlefield, face deadly enemies, and discover a glimpse of the world of Foedus.

items.title: Spin Cycle Demo
items.short_description: 一款以黑社会会计师为主角的肉鸽策略游戏。接下卡特尔与受制裁政权的合同，在20多个司法管辖区之间设计洗钱路线，在制裁加密货币市场上博弈。只是千万别招惹国际刑警。

items.title: SCROLLBOUND
items.short_description: 通过简单的三键操作，体验节奏紧张的Roguelite生存防御战斗。守护上古秘卷，抵御来自两侧的无尽敌潮，解锁强大能力，打造独特流派，并尽可能长时间地生存下去。

items.title: 两面爱 Demo
items.short_description: 感情中最大的变数是什么？是「他」吗？抑或是「她心中的他」？用这个60分钟的小故事，剖析感情中的「占有欲」、「控制欲」。

items.title: NEKO MAKER: Catgirl Raising Story
items.short_description: 她六岁来到你身边。十二年后，她会成为什么样的人——取决于你的每一个选择。15种结局，61个事件，一封只属于你们的信。

items.title: LIMBY
items.short_description: LIMBY is a twisted puzzle platformer. Play as Limby, a frat bro turned zombie. Traverse through 30 absurd and brain scrambling levels. Use your severed limbs to reach new heights and unlock new pathways to achieve your ultimate goal: Devour. The. Nerd.

items.title: Tank 99
items.short_description: 玩家控制坦克，穿梭在各种地形中，保护基地不被击破，同时击溃所有敌军坦克，获得胜利

items.title: The Miki Komori Project
items.short_description: Before the streams and before anyone knew her name, there was only Miki. Explore the hidden origins of TheMikiKomori in an atmospheric visual novel about loneliness, identity, and the strange mysteries pulling her toward an uncertain future beneath the digital sea.

items.title: 东北往事
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 28 篇用户评测中有 75% 为好评。
items.short_description: 本作深度改编自著名国民级IP《东北往事之黑道风云20年》。故事始于上世纪80、90年代东北暗流汹涌的街头，旧秩序正在改变。你，赵红兵，被卷入兄弟义气与地盘争夺的漩涡。与此同时，清纯如雪的高欢、泼辣似火的毛琴等红颜相继闯入你的生命；而情感的交织与江湖的算计接连上演。在权力与欲望面前，你的选择将彻底改写自己与他人的命运，走出独属于你自己的“道”

items.title: UnfAIr War: Survivors
items.short_description: This is NOT a "forever" roguelike for thousands of hours. It's a game for a few cozy evenings. Download — launch — play immediately. No skill trees, no boring meta-grind. Just pure co-op action: you're chained together, dodging waves of robots, throwing grenades, and triggering ultimates.

items.title: Frog Climb
items.short_description: 🐸Free-To-Play🐸 Stop following someone else's route. Create your own way to the top by building your own path 🐸 Frog Climb is a stylized co-op climbing adventure where you must escape from terrariums 🐸 Level up, gain powerful upgrades, and prove that no wall is too high for a frog with a plan 🐸

items.title: Eden's Eclipse Demo
items.short_description: The third installment in the Eden series A 2D bullet-hell vertical-scrolling shump with a feel reminiscent of arcade games from the 1990s to the 2000s.

items.title: Gin - The Silver Wind
items.short_description: Become a Kamaitachi in this methodical 2D platformer. You can't change direction in mid-air. Use your double jump to anticipate your landing and maneuver through the air with the use of a powerful Tornado move. Master the movement and challenge yourself to overcome the tough battles ahead!

items.title: Operation: Black Genesis - The Immortal Trials
items.short_description: top-down co-op survival horror game where players deploy into deadly Quarantined Zones, fight mutated experiments, and extract with everything you can carry—because if you die, you lose it all.

items.title: Horde Beyond
items.short_description: Master full fast-paced tactical space combat with dynamic missions, coordinated enemy squadrons, and deep ship upgrades. Fight through hostile space in with battlefield hazards, adaptive enemy tactics, alone or in co-op or bots with up to 4 players.

items.title: 電影大戦
items.short_description: Time is your penalty! No lives—getting hit drains your clock. Slay enemies and harvest energy before time runs out! "Strike first, strike fast!" Shatter shields and unleash massive counter lasers with a Perfect Parry! "Den-ei Taisen" evolves every play. Pick 1 of 3 skills. High-speed roguelite!

items.title: 机动战线
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 这是一款极具特色的机甲对抗游戏，多人多抗，最低为1V1玩家对抗，以攻击敌方主基地，击垮敌方战力条为主，快速推进进行移动距离，你可以使用任何武器进行战斗，比如优秀的FA光速步枪，或者是蓄力光速枪进行反击，毅或者选择使用火箭筒进行打鸟，或者选择光速军刀进行机甲格斗战，无论哪一种相信你会非常容易上手，在战场中，你还可以通过丢弃武器或者拾取武器改变作战形式，这款游戏的上手程度非常容易，在精神上能找回你曾经的感觉，相信你一定会喜欢这款游戏

items.title: Digital Anima: Virtual Lifeform Care Kit
items.short_description: Digital Anima: Electronic Life Form Raising Kit is a psychological desktop invasion horror game where you raise a virtual pet on your own computer. Raise a Digima inside a tiny window on your desktop and watch the conspiracy behind its evolution and the truth about its developer slowly unravel.

items.title: Granny's Rampage
items.short_description: Granny's had enough. Armed with a minigun and a bad attitude, she's cutting through five stages of demonic suburbia, hellfire, and the forces of darkness itself.

items.title: 宽恕我（Show me mercy） Demo
items.short_description: 《宽恕我》是一款主要为像素风格的悬疑AVG乙女游戏，您将通过扮演主角莉莉丝，体验成为公爵遗孀的生活。每章节的阶段性目标为杀死对您或其他人产生威胁的对象，您可以自由选择谋杀方式和动手时机、在动手前进行祷告以请求宽恕。当然，不同选择将带来不同的结局，请尽量达成完美犯罪避免被送上审判席。同时您将于四位男主产生交集，他们分别是你的继子、青梅竹马兼小镇牧师、年轻的治安官、神秘药剂师。您可以选择对他们坦诚相待或隐瞒您的想法甚至和他们达成合作，在最终章中您可以选择其一成为您的最终共犯，这将开启不同结局。祝您游玩愉快。

items.title: Orbital Physics Simulator
items.short_description: Master physics in this hardcore orbital simulator where Einstein’s theories come to life. Plot trajectories and manipulate spacetime via general relativity, time dilation, and length contraction. Command your starship, outrun time, and explore a universe governed by real physics.

items.title: 木偶之匣
items.short_description: 《木偶之匣》是一款2D平面解谜游戏，你将进入维多利亚时期的神秘庄园，开启一幕野心和欲望交织的悲剧。穿行于诡异的木偶之间，运用智慧，解开谜题，搜集线索，夺取义眼，探寻索恩家族衰败的真相。

items.title: 释厄传
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 52 篇用户评测中有 82% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《释厄传》是一款主打【后西游都市怪谈】的牌组构建式Roguelike！在这个神佛异化的世界里，利用逆天科技增强牌组，为卡牌打上专属词条。搭配1000+海量卡牌与300+法宝，构筑属于你的极致爽局！

items.title: EvoluCell Demo
items.short_description: 免费试玩：仅第1章（约20～30分钟）。射击·吞噬·炎症风暴，3次基因商店，Boss节律原体。更多章节与形态进化开发中，欢迎愿望单。

items.title: THE MIDNIGHT QUEENS
items.short_description: A crime-themed RPG Maker game taking place in the streets of Vancouver. Featuring a large cast of cute, and dangerous chibi girls.

items.title: 矿业帝国
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 20 篇用户评测中有 80% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在《矿业帝国》中，你将从基础采矿开始，不断开采资源、升级和部署装备，实现矿场全自动运转。利用炸药突破深层矿脉，解锁转生强化与高阶科技，持续扩大你的产业版图，最终建立属于自己的矿业帝国

items.title: 黑帆王座·Galactic Loadout
items.short_description: 在《黑帆王座·Galactic Loadout》中，堆叠离谱联武器，赌出逆天搭配，让战舰战力无限膨胀。每一次选择都在失控边缘狂飙——直到你碾碎整片星海。

items.title: 你妈真漂亮
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 58% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一个发生在夏天的故事。一对同样是在单亲家庭长大的好友，都有着优秀的母亲，而他们各自暗恋着对方的母亲。

items.title: 挂机破坏神 IdleDiablo
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 38 篇用户评测中有 57% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《挂机破坏神 IdleDiablo》是一款以装备驱动为核心的类暗黑挂机刷宝游戏。无需繁琐操作，通过挂机的形式即可获取游戏内的所有资源，利用自身智慧合理搭配装备和技能即可击败各种强大的怪物屹立世界之巅！

items.title: 家喵二三事 Vol. 2
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Mint and her friends return in NEKO-MIMI SWEET HOUSEMATES 2! In order to save her family, a girl will defy fate itself and become the personification of miracles...

items.title: Synergy Strike
items.short_description: Combine synergy attacks, shatter geometric hordes, and climb the leaderboards! Synergy Strike is a bullet heaven roguelike with hypnotic audio-reactive visuals that pulse to the beat.

items.title: Chop Loop Demo
items.short_description: 一款3D增量式伐木游戏，每棵树都会改变你的玩法。解锁独特的树木机制，用符文控制哪些树木出现，并升级海狸来实现伐木自动化

items.title: 猫咪の世界
items.short_description: 本游戏猫咪の世界受PokeRouge启发，采用类似Snes Mode7的复古视觉效果，结合传统回合制游戏的框架，以自动化战斗刷宝为增量进行队伍养成。 你可以保留等级和装备，投入到以后的战斗中。装备可刷属性，可打造词条。游戏包含属性克制，技能需要合理分配。

items.title: Item Shop Simulator
items.short_description: 在澳大利亚内陆经营一家物品商店。出售剑、药水和鸸鹋蛋。探索15个地牢获取战利品。你的顾客们工作赚钱，然后在你的商店消费……前提是你能保证供货。

items.title: OxVOID Demo
items.short_description: OxVOID —— 一款极简风格的解谜游戏，在这里，物理、逻辑与环境作为一个统一系统共同运作。 通过精心设计的挑战掌握规则。 然后打破边界——在内置关卡编辑器中创造属于你自己的关卡。

items.title: One Billion Ducks Demo
items.short_description: An incremental journey about duck hunting with your canine companions. Shoot rare ducks, sell them, upgrade your abilities, and collect one billion ducks to combat world hunger!

items.title: Orbosis Gloriosis
items.short_description: 一款基于物理的增量游戏，在其中你分裂并合并球体。

items.title: 铁鸟
items.short_description: 正统纵向卷轴弹幕射击×肉鸽。 10架各具特色的战机、10种子机、数十种宇宙之力。 在弹幕的缝隙中穿行，打造你的神级构建。

items.title: Phemx Demo
items.short_description: Phemx is a simple but increasingly challenging retro-style arcade game. Use your paddle to bounce the balls to safety and get a big score!

808 explores the memories that define us and what happens when they're taken away. It's a surreal game about love, loss, and a difficult choice: the pain of authenticity, or the peace of self forgetfulness.

items.title: Hakoniwa Base Ball Demo
items.short_description: A baseball simulation inspired by Japanese professional baseball. Manage drafts, FA, contracts, and stadium finances with an accessible interface. Customize your league, team count, and season length to recreate KBO, CPBL, or MLB-scale play. Depth without complexity.

items.title: 暗黑修仙塔防
items.short_description: 这是以英雄构筑+元素反应+装备掉落为核心玩法的3D塔防，邀你集结九系灵根修士，布下绝杀仙阵抵御魔潮。金、木、水、火等九大灵根自由搭配，触发超载、冻结、神雷、湮灭等百种元素连锁，AOE爆屏炸怪，尽享视觉与策略双重快感。 二十余位男女老幼、人妖异族修士任你操控，普攻、元素战技、元素爆发三大技能可升级强化，实时把控施法时机即可扭转战局。挑战BOSS、通关掉落稀有装备与专武，自由堆攻击、暴击、元素增伤等流派，穿戴装备更能解锁炼气至化神的修仙境界。 3D俯视角清晰掌控战场，多路径来敌、随机怪物、多BOSS入侵让每局都新鲜。战役、无尽、挑战三大模式，休闲与高难兼顾，策略与操作并存，体验布防刷怪爽感！

items.title: Amnesia Bullet Demo
items.short_description: 《Amnesia Bullet》试玩版是一款支持陀螺仪瞄准的第三人称射击游戏。可游玩开场剧情、教程和第一个记忆关卡。

items.title: Backrooms Untold
items.short_description: Backrooms Untold is an atmospheric horror experience where you’re lost in an endless, infinite maze of fluorescent lit corridors, stained carpet, and humming lights. The deeper you go, the more it feels wrong—familiar spaces twisting into something hostile and unknowable.

items.title: Bodian's Bay Wash Demo
items.short_description: 一款令人放松的海底VR清洁模拟游戏！使用高压水枪和刮刀清理船体，粉碎藤壶，并扩展你专属的海底清洗站。购买家具，升级设备，准备迎接体型巨大的巨无霸客户吧！

items.title: Astaryn: RPG Idler
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 71% 为好评。
items.short_description: Astaryn: Chained Realms 是一款长期放置奇幻 RPG：选择英雄职业，离线训练专业，制作装备和食物，提升战力，准备挑战地下城，并解锁宏大的任务战役。

items.title: ANVİLFALL
items.short_description: 管理最后的矮人要塞。战前制定部队计划，带领战士生存下去，不断发展壮大，搜寻资源，招募更强大的部队，并观察你的决策如何影响战斗结果。

items.title: Oro Cade Demo
items.short_description: Master ORO CADE, a relaxing 3D logic puzzler. Target color groups to clear the board, but don’t break the chain or blocks will reappear! Demo contains 10 of 70 handcrafted levels, 3 modes of difficulty and a dynamic soundtrack.

items.title: Forgive Me My Love
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 关于内疚的沉重压力的心理恐怖。 经历一场毁灭性悲剧的后果：你的妻子死了，这是你的错。 但是当她的棺材被带回家时，一些令人费解和可怕的东西开始扭曲你的现实。..

items.title: FISH
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 161 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: FISH is a Platformer Run & Gun Shooter where you play as an armed FISH violently exploring through multiple levels. The game features a funny, unique stylized artstyle that could get a chuckle out of you!

items.title: Election Train
items.short_description: A turn-based strategy card game where up to 4 players compete for votes across real-world maps. Play cards, control cities, dominate regions, and outsmart your rivals to win the election. 7 maps, 4 unique parties, and dynamic disaster events.

items.title: Pull Factor
items.short_description: Turn a tiny magnet into a metal-devouring machine as you upgrade, retry, and conquer chaotic arcade stages.

items.title: Crazy Neighbour
items.short_description: A psychological horror game set in a small post-Soviet town. You play as a troubled man, drowning himself in cheap beer while being pulled deeper into the shadows of his dark past.

items.title: Neverwood
items.short_description: You journey through the haunted forest of Neverwood in board game orchestrated by a dark and mysterious game master named Bella. The game blends grid based combat with deckbuilding roguelike mechanics in a dreary yet somewhat cozy Halloween themed atmosphere.

items.title: Push It! Demo
items.short_description: PUSH IT! is a local split-control co-op game about two operators running an unstable emergency reactor.

items.title: Goo Deer
items.short_description: Goo Deer is a dark, first-person gas station management game set in a foggy world addicted to the strange drink Goo Deer. Craft and sell Goo Deer, manage inventory, and hire employees. you venture into the misty forest to hunt deer for ingredients. avoiding a dangerous creature lurking in the fog

items.title: Veil: Project Conductor
items.short_description: The train derails in an abandoned tunnel.No signal, no exits — only darkness and the broken remains of the carriage.You are an undercover journalist, and you had a reason to be on this train.

items.title: Knight on the Moon
items.short_description: Built for the original Nintendo Entertainment System hardware, this top-down action-adventure challenges players to survive and explore a hostile moon crawling with alien life, abandoned bases, and deadly secrets.

items.title: Clash of Courts
items.short_description: Enter the arena and clash for glory in this fast-paced fantasy multiplayer experience for the NES or PC. Play with up to 6 players

items.title: Shatterhold
items.short_description: 放置生存与共享世界的融合之作。你的据点 24 小时产出资源。你的远征推回正在崩裂的现实。25 个区域，8,000 片地块，一个共同的世界。每位玩家都至关重要。成败由你所在的整个区域共享。

items.title: Jack Pottwin: House of Odds Demo
items.short_description: Fight your way up a casino tower to wake from a fever dream in this Roguelike Deckbuilder. Craft your deck, modify runs with lucky coins, and control the Odds. Fuse cards to build high value attacks, trigger poker combos to add powerful combat traits to your cards.

items.title: Deliverage
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: Deliverage is a hardcore open-world PvP delivery game where every shipment is a gamble. Fight other players for valuable cargo, repair and modify fragile vehicles, outplay rivals in a shifting economy, and climb from nothing to the top of a ruthless world.

items.title: Kitty Krush
items.short_description: Kitty Krush 是一个关于蜂群意识猫文明奴役人类的温馨猫咪故事。在简化的卡组构筑玩法中，每轮游玩解锁章节。根据真实故事改编。

items.title: Plant Nursery Simulator
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 265 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款轻松模拟游戏中经营温馨的植物苗圃。种植作物，补充货架，服务顾客。扩建温室，雇佣员工，装饰梦想店铺。适合喜欢治愈农场和模拟游戏的玩家。

items.title: Oleander-X Demo
items.short_description: Oleander-X is a pixel-art stealth action game about classified missions, buried evidence, and a cure that should never have existed. Infiltrate guarded facilities, gather proof, plant explosives, and escape before the truth turns against you.

items.title: The Bone Crypt
items.short_description: Steam’s first PvP Domino Deckbuilder! Connect pips on bone tiles to chain attacks and outsmart enemies in a tactical roguelike tomb. Master a deep solo campaign or crush rivals in online PvP. No cards, just pure bone-clinking strategy. Do you have the marrow to escape the crypt?

items.title: Neon Pulsefire
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 13 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Create an endless variety of unique builds and decimate huge waves of enemies. Unlock unique classes, weapons, passives and stats to unlock even more overpowered builds as you weave your way through enemies, arena hazards and projectile assaults.

items.title: Acatalepsy
items.short_description: Welcome to Acatalepsy, a new take on the liminal space experience. Progress deeper into varying liminal spaces with your team. Complete various tasks to continue forward, dive deeper, and don't expect to survive for long. You aren't alone in these spaces; nowhere is safe.

items.title: Age of Resistance
items.short_description: Age of Resistance 是一款以南美洲为背景的现代大战略游戏。实时（可暂停）管理经济、内部稳定、政治意识形态和地区冲突。你能成功称霸整个大陆吗？

items.title: Neon Planet
items.short_description: 在霓虹外星行星上建立生活。耕作、钓鱼、烹饪、制作、装饰你的家。深入100层矿井，攀登战斗尖塔，在赌场获胜。单人游玩或与 最多24名朋友一起，体验玩家驱动的经济。

items.title: Neofold
items.short_description: 一款无限生物收集游戏，每只生物都由你的GPU实时生成，独一无二。孵化无穷无尽的奇妙物种，收养你喜爱的那些，在桌面上培育一个只属于你的活力生态园。

items.title: Slimecity
items.short_description: An ADORABLELY SQUISHY rougelite game~! Command your army of slimes using the power of overwhelming number of Slime to gather and claim resources! But be AWARE of the time, because if it runs out before your lil guys are home, then The Horsemen will come charging!

items.title: Rise Of Eurevia
items.short_description: 击败地下城中的强大敌人，获取传奇装备！成为你所属阵营中的强大战士，并在战场上碾压你的对手！

items.title: SAND: Raiders of Sophie
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 1,563 篇用户评测中有 58% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在架空的1910年，驾驶巨型“践踏者”穿越索菲的沙海展开搜刮。建造你高度可自定义的步行基地，单人或组队行动，收集战利品、武器与珍贵遗物。在历史与混乱锻造的程序生成荒漠中，与其他玩家激烈交锋。

items.title: Bootloop
items.short_description: Brain busting puzzles to drive you loopy. Set up to 8 instructions that loop infinitely to reach the exit. Jump over obstacles and pitfalls, and use walls to your advantage. All Easy, Medium and Hard puzzles unlocked, so attempt them in any order.

items.title: Carmilla : Crimson Moon Demo
items.short_description: A dark yuri horror visual novel inspired by a classic gothic novella. When the enigmatic Carmilla arrives, Laura is swept into a fever dream of obsession. Is this stranger the cure for her loneliness or a herald of corruption? And what caused the mysterious deaths of two girls in the nearby village?

items.title: Café Manager
items.short_description: 创建一个温馨的咖啡馆，招聘最优秀的团队，将你的小生意变成城里的热门话题。定制每一个细节，让顾客满意，看着你的利润不断增长。最好的咖啡馆就是你亲手打造的咖啡馆！

items.title: Lumina Veil
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 34 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。
items.short_description: Lumina Veil, a horror game with a modern twist! Step into the shoes of a popular streamer on a journey into a strange new game. As you dive deeper, you'll find yourself escaping the isolation of your own world, only to discover that the lines between fantasy and reality are beginning to blur.

items.title: Veil of Mist
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 71% 为好评。
items.short_description: Life ends… but the story doesn’t. After death, you find yourself in a strange, distorted place where normal logic no longer applies. Explore, hide, solve puzzles, and try to figure out exactly where you’ve ended up.

items.title: Jungle Defenders
items.short_description: Get ready for a wild third-person action journey where nature strikes back! In this explosive roguelike bullet hell, you play as fearless animals sworn to protect their forest from a relentless technological threat: invading robots set on exploiting natural resources and destroying the environment.

items.title: Reflection Arena
items.short_description: 这是一款在流弹飞舞的封闭竞技场中，挑战闪避与拦截极限的射击动作游戏。

items.title: Parkour & Freerunning Demo
items.short_description: Run, jump, swim, dive, climb, wall-run, vault, roll, flip, balance, crouch, crawl, walk, slide, hang, swing, zipline, and more through hand-crafted and randomly generated locations and challenges! Enjoy unlimited, re-playable time trials, races, trick score, tag, hide & seek, and a whole lot more!!

items.title: Silent Dread: Last Order Demo
items.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game about a late-night delivery and the disturbing events that follow.

items.title: 圣火守望者：共筑防线
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 270 篇用户评测中有 64% 为好评。
items.short_description: 迎击铺天盖地的敌潮，筑起钢铁防线！在《圣火守望者：共筑防线》满屏怪物的围攻下，一边疯狂输出，一边即时建造塔楼、围墙与防御设施。搜刮随机神器，强化武器与英雄配置，死守竞技场中央的信标——只要信标未灭，战斗永不停歇！支持单人游玩，亦可2-4人热血联机。

items.title: Ponder Thy Realm
items.short_description: Observe magical environments, memorize your surroundings, detect magical aberrations, and report them before time runs out on the clock and reality unravels in this first-person observation game.

items.title: Hero of Sunset
items.short_description: 踏上这款复古像素风的开放世界动作冒险之旅。探索、战斗、解谜、挑战Boss——最重要的是，你还能与可爱的女孩们谈恋爱！

items.title: Flagship Down Demo
items.short_description: Tactical roguelike auto-battler. Assemble your fleet and equip your flagship with modules and weapons. Recruit and assign crew members to your ships. Start the round and watch your strategy unfold in fully automated battles.

items.title: Scales of Silence
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 腾出沙发，开启贪吃蛇本地合作。一款以长度为生命的本地派对游戏：最多8人共享同一屏幕进行PvP对战，外加2人合作剧情战役。先把朋友缩短，免得被朋友缩短。

potential_items.title: Orb of Creation
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 1,511 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Orb of Creation is an active incremental-puzzle game in which you recreate the world with nothing but magic and ingenuity. Conjure resources, buy upgrades, and become an all-powerful wizard!

potential_items.title: How To Grow a Black Hole
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 56 篇用户评测中有 80% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: How To Grow a Black Hole 讲的是……嗯……如何养大一个黑洞。管理你的黑洞，喂食以增加质量，并防止灾难性坍缩。与全球玩家或好友竞争，打造最大的黑洞。也许你会成为第一名。

potential_items.title: Chrono CCG
